description:
Holistic improvement pass on ir_typer.rs across three axes:

REMOVE
- specialize_return (90-line dead hook, drifts from type_fn)
- let _ = i; vestigial suppression in Goto handler
- bi.checked_rem(1) dead computation in numeric_result_fold
- per-call idx_of rebuilds (4 sites, each O(n_fns))
- FnTypes clone on every discovery-walk call
- full-spec re-walk each closure-to-fixpoint iteration
- per-iteration opaque_consumer_arities recomputation

CHANGE
- fn_by_id: linear scan → O(1) via Module-level HashMap
- idx_of: rebuilt per call → hoisted once into type_module_pass
- drain/register/walk: 4 duplicated copies → 1 extracted helper
- type_fn block traversal: storage order → topological order

ADD
- worklist-based closure-to-fixpoint (only new specs trigger re-walks)
- compound condition narrowing: BinOp::And/Or in narrow_for_if
- any-key secondary index in ModuleTypes (O(1) lookup, no is_equiv scan)

DAG (each step is one commit):
  T1 fn_by_id O(1)         ─┐
  T2 remove let _ = i       │ no deps, can land in any order
  T3 remove checked_rem     │
  T4 remove specialize_return┘
  S1 hoist idx_of           → C1 avoid FnTypes clone
                            → W0 extract helper → W1 remove opaque recompute
                                               → W2 worklist
  F1 topo block order       (independent)
  P1 And/Or narrowing       (independent, more valuable after W2)
  L1 any-key secondary index(independent)
title: typer: efficiency, precision, and dead-code removal
